ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BREEDLOVE, HANS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREEDLOVE, HANS THOMPSON, GLORIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET #320, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL DEC-01-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS DO NOT VACATE BY 5PM ON 12-1-96; PLTF ENTITLED TO AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR $270 BACK RENT, DMGS OF $19.29 PER DAY FROM 9-9-96 THRU 12-1-96 PLUS $83 COSTS. GENERAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. SEC DEPOSIT FORFEITED. PERSONAL PROPTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS/FEES IF DEFTS VACATE.
